languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

languages.text: "Чужаки, не чужаки... как ты вообще умудряешься хоть что-то почуять за всей этой гарью? Я вижу только дрянное полузаброшенное местечко, в котором кто-то устроил изрядный беспорядок".
"Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."
languages.original_text: "Чужаки, не чужаки... как ты вообще умудряешься хоть что-то почуять за всей этой гарью? Я вижу только дрянное полузаброшенное местечко, в котором кто-то устроил изрядный беспорядок".

traits.locale_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."
"Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."
"Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

languages.text: 「ゼノであろうがなかろうが…煙の臭いの中、どうやって匂いを感じられるんだ？ 雑然とした、半分放棄された場所だ。誰かが大惨事を起こした場所だ」
languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

traits.locale_text: 「異邦人であろうがなかろうが…煙の臭いの中、どうやって匂いを感じられるんだ？ 雑然とした、半分放棄された場所だ。誰かが大惨事を起こした場所だ。」

languages.text: « Sans parler des xénos... comment pouvez-vous sentir quoi que ce soit avec toutes ces émanations ? Tout ce que je vois, moi, c'est un endroit délabré et à moitié abandonné où quelqu'un a mis une sacrée pagaille. »
languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

traits.locale_text: « Sans parler des xénos... comment pouvez-vous sentir quoi que ce soit avec toutes ces émanations ? Tout ce que je vois, moi, c'est un endroit délabré et à moitié abandonné où quelqu'un a mis une sacrée pagaille. »

languages.text: "Xenos oder nicht ... wie könnt Ihr bei all dem Rauch etwas riechen? Ich sehe nur einen schäbigen, halb verlassenen Ort, an dem jemand ein mächtiges Chaos veranstaltet hat."
languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

traits.locale_text: "Xenos oder nicht ... wie könnt Ihr bei all dem Rauch etwas riechen? Ich sehe nur einen schäbigen, halb verlassenen Ort, an dem jemand ein mächtiges Chaos veranstaltet hat."

languages.text: "Zeno ya da değil... Tüm bu dumanların arasından nasıl koku alabiliyorsun? Benim tek gördüğüm; birinin içine ettiği döküntü, yarı terk edilmiş bir yer."
languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno ya da değil... Tüm bu dumanların arasından nasıl koku alabiliyorsun? Benim tek gördüğüm; birinin içine ettiği döküntü, yarı terk edilmiş bir yer."

languages.text: «Por muy xenos que sea, ¿cómo puede nadie oler nada con tantos gases y vapores? Yo lo único que veo es un lugar destartalado y medio abandonado que alguien ha puesto en rebomba».
languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

traits.locale_text: «Por muy xenos que sea, ¿cómo puede nadie oler nada con tantos gases y vapores? Yo lo único que veo es un lugar destartalado y medio abandonado que alguien ha puesto en rebomba».

languages.text: “不管是不是异形……你是怎么能透过这么多废气闻到东西的？我只看到一个被某人搞得一团糟、几近废弃的鬼地方。”
languages.original_text: "Xenos or no... how can you smell anything through all the fumes? All I see is a shoddy, half-abandoned place that someone made an almighty mess of."

traits.locale_text: “不管是不是异形……你是怎么能透过这么多废气闻到东西的？我只看到一个被某人搞得一团糟、几近废弃的鬼地方。”
